Biz New Orleans URL Source: https://bizneworleans.com/nearly-1-million-people-visit-new-orleans-for-mardi-gras/ Published Time: 2025-03-24T12:41:46-05:00 Markdown Content: # Nearly 1 Million People Visit New Orleans for Mardi Gras - Biz New Orleans *   [News](https://bizneworleans.com/todays-business-news/) *   [Podcast](https://bizneworleans.com/ca", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Mardi Gras Statistics in US 2026 | Key Facts - The World Data", "url": "https://theworlddata.com/mardi-gras-statistics-in-us/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Mardi Gras Statistics in US 2026 | Key Facts - The World Data URL Source: https://theworlddata.com/mardi-gras-statistics-in-us/ Published Time: 2026-02-14T08:07:41+00:00 Markdown Content: **Mardi Gras** \u2014 French for \u201cFat Tuesday\u201d \u2014 stands as one of the most electrifying, culturally rich, and economically significant celebrations in the entire United States. In **2026**, the **Carnival season** officially kicked off on **January 6 (Twelfth Night)** and culminated on **Fat Tuesday, February 17, 2026**, drawing hundreds of thousands of visitors from across the country and around the world to the streets of **New Orleans, Louisiana**, **Mobile, Alabama**, and dozens of other Gulf Coast cities. What began in **1699** when French explorer Pierre Le Moyne d\u2019Iberville named a stretch of the Mississippi River \u201cPointe du Mardi Gras\u201d has grown into one of America\u2019s most celebrated and economically powerful annual events. The **2026 Mardi Gras season** is particularly notable as it coincided with both **Valentine\u2019s Day** and **Presidents\u2019 Day weekend**, a rare calendar alignment that pushed hotel bookings, visitor spending, and overall tourism volumes to peak levels not seen since pre-pandemic years. What makes **Mardi Gras 2026** a watershed moment in modern American festival tourism is the convergence of record-breaking crowd projections, a heavily fortified public safety infrastructure, and steadily recovering hospitality metrics. According to data from **New Orleans & Company** \u2014 the city\u2019s official tourism promotion agency \u2014 downtown hotel occupancy was tracking at approximately **90%** across **26,000 hotel rooms** in the French Quarter and downtown core during the final Mardi Gras weekend, matching the **87% average** recorded across the five-night stretch in **2025** and significantly outpacing the **81% average** seen in **2024**. The most recent **Mardi Gras Economic Impact Study**, commissioned by the **Mayor\u2019s Mardi Gras Advisory Council** and conducted by **Tulane University Economics Professor Toni L. Weiss**, placed the total direct and indirect economic footprint of the celebration at **$891,202,780** \u2014 representing **3.07% of New Orleans\u2019 Gross Domestic Product**. From the **Super Krewe parades** rolling down St. Charles Avenue to the hundreds of law enforcement officers deployed city-wide, **Mardi Gras 2026** is an economic, cultural, and logistical spectacle on an extraordinary scale. ## **Interesting Facts: Mardi Gras in the US 2026** | **Fact** | **Detail** | | --- | --- | | **Official Mardi Gras Day 2026** | **Tuesday, February 17, 2026** | | **Carnival Season Start** | **January 6, 2026** (Twelfth Night) | | **First US Mardi Gras** | **March 3, 1699** \u2014 at Pointe du Mardi Gras, Louisiana | | **First American Mardi Gras Celebration** | **1703** \u2014 Fort Louis de la Mobile, Alabama | | **First Organized New Orleans Krewe** | **Mistick Krewe of Comus**, formed **1856\u20131857** | | **Official Mardi Gras Colors** | **Purple** (Justice), *", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Study Finds New Orleans' Mardi Gras Generates Nearly $900 Million of ...", "url": "https://www.neworleans.com/articles/post/study-finds-new-orleans-mardi-gras-generates-nearly-900-million-of-economic-impact/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Study Finds New Orleans\u2019 Mardi Gras Generates Nearly $900 Million of Economic Impact URL Source: https://www.neworleans.com/articles/post/study-finds-new-orleans-mardi-gras-generates-nearly-900-million-of-economic-impact/ Published Time: 2024-01-05T23:00:00.000Z Markdown Content: # Study Finds New Orleans\u2019 Mardi Gras Generates Nearly $900 Million of Economic Impact ![Image 3: New Orleans & Company](https://www.neworleans.com/includes/public/assets/shared/logo.svg) Your browser is not supported for this experience.
